testsuite.name: com.example.rental.dashboard.application.impl.DashBoardUseCaseTest

testcase.name: getDashboardSummary should return correct aggregated values()
getTopCustomers should wrap exceptions into DashboardDataAccessException()
getRecentRentals should wrap exceptions into DashboardDataAccessException()
getMonthlyRevenue should wrap exceptions into DashboardDataAccessException()

testsuite.system-out: 22:50:41.168 [Test worker] INFO com.example.rental.dashboard.application.impl.DashBoardUseCase -- Building dashboard summary for userId=1, start=2026-02-27T22:50:41.152564, end=2026-03-06T22:50:41.152590 22:50:41.179 [Test worker] INFO com.example.rental.dashboard.application.impl.DashBoardUseCase -- Fetching top customers for userId=1, size=3 22:50:41.180 [Test worker]
